description: Our Wayne maid Waists are Beautiful 98c to 400 Spring Showing of all that is new in SUITS DRESSES COATS SKIRTS AND MILLINERY Following Our usual X Millinery ustoui Something New Evt ry Day f T Y X I t I T t f T f 1 financiers oi Senate Pian j Higher Taxes Meet Deficit Washington Feb 13A treasury deficit of 333400000 at the end of the next fiscal year is forecast in a report submitted today by the senate finance committee which recommended that the administration revenue bill be amended to authorize a bond issue of 195256000 instead of 100000000 and that the authorization for the is suance of certificates of indebtedness be for 500000000 instead of for 300 000000 The recommendation for the in creased is based on revised treasury department estimates submitted to congress since the bill passed the house placing the federal government expenditures for the fiscal year 1918 at 1400000000 The committee esti mates that to meet this total and pro vide a working balance the aomunt which must he raised by bonds and new revenue legislation is 433400000 This the committee proposes to raise as follows By bond issues For expenditures on account
